response.step_by_step_log: I carefully watched and listened to the entire video. The video contains only spoken dialogue from the four virtual YouTubers and game-related sound effects. There is no background music containing vocals. Therefore, no song identification or lyric searches were possible.
response.global_summary: The video features four virtual YouTubers competing in a water gun target practice game, consisting entirely of spoken dialogue and in-game sound effects.

scenes.description: Virtual YouTubers talk, instruct, and play a shooting game with water guns. No vocal music is present.
